vanguard.name: Vanguard Coalition
vanguard.description: The last organized remnant of humanity, holding the line with disciplined fleets.

swarm.name: The Swarm
swarm.description: A ravenous bio-collective that converts captured worlds into biomass.

necromancer.name: Void Necromancers
necromancer.description: Cult fleets that raise the fallen from the wreckage of battle.
